notes: logical_id values are snapshot-local and must be remapped during import
runtime ids, hashes, and class ids are intentionally excluded from persisted semantic state

required_preconditions: restore target must be fresh with respect to semantic state
source_schema alignment proof is required for v1 restore

guaranteed_restorable.detail: common-path semantic rows are part of the supported v1 restore contract
eggplant-native relation facts are part of the supported v1 restore contract
built-in/common-path literal sort is restorable with machine payloads
built-in/common-path literal sort is restorable with machine payloads

other_limitations.detail: v1 exporter does not yet persist union history; state.unions is empty
v1 exporter does not yet persist run scheduling history; state.runs is empty
persisted ruleset declarations are provenance-only metadata in v1; restore ignores them and they do not imply rule body/run replay semantics
v2 eq_class_payload is inspect-only metadata; restore continues to use the v1 semantic-state substrate
v2 eq_class_payload is inspect-only metadata and does not participate in restore semantics

diagnostics.message: v1 exporter does not yet persist union history; state.unions is empty
v1 exporter does not yet persist run scheduling history; state.runs is empty
persisted ruleset declarations are provenance-only metadata in v1; restore ignores them and they do not imply rule body/run replay semantics
v2 eq_class_payload is inspect-only metadata; restore continues to use the v1 semantic-state substrate
